trans-unit.source: Methods in interfaces inheriting from IRemoteJsonService should not have parameters of type RazorPinnedSolutionInfoWrapper or DocumentId as they are not Json serializable.
trans-unit.target: Methods in interfaces inheriting from IRemoteJsonService should not have parameters of type RazorPinnedSolutionInfoWrapper or DocumentId as they are not Json serializable.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' parameter in '{1}.{2}' has a parameter of type '{3}' which is not allowed in a Json service
trans-unit.target: '{0}' parameter in '{1}.{2}' has a parameter of type '{3}' which is not allowed in a Json service

trans-unit.source: Invalid parameter type in IRemoteJsonService method
trans-unit.target: Invalid parameter type in IRemoteJsonService method

trans-unit.source: Calling EnumerableExtensions or ReadOnlyListExtensions methods on ImmutableArray<T> causes the struct to be boxed, which creates unnecessary allocations. Use the corresponding ImmutableArray<T> extension methods instead.
trans-unit.target: Calling EnumerableExtensions or ReadOnlyListExtensions methods on ImmutableArray<T> causes the struct to be boxed, which creates unnecessary allocations. Use the corresponding ImmutableArray<T> extension methods instead.

trans-unit.source: Call to '{0}' on ImmutableArray<T> causes boxing. Consider using the ImmutableArray<T> extension method instead.
trans-unit.target: Call to '{0}' on ImmutableArray<T> causes boxing. Consider using the ImmutableArray<T> extension method instead.

trans-unit.source: ImmutableArray<T> is being boxed to IReadOnlyList<T>
trans-unit.target: ImmutableArray<T> is being boxed to IReadOnlyList<T>

trans-unit.source: Instance of PooledArrayBuilder<T>.AsRef() must be a 'using' variable.
trans-unit.target: Instance of PooledArrayBuilder<T>.AsRef() must be a 'using' variable.
trans-unit.note: An optional longer localizable description of the diagnostic.

trans-unit.source: Instance of PooledArrayBuilder<T>.AsRef() must be a 'using' variable
trans-unit.target: Instance of PooledArrayBuilder<T>.AsRef() must be a 'using' variable
trans-unit.note: The format-able message the diagnostic displays.

trans-unit.source: Instance of PooledArrayBuilder<T>.AsRef() must be a 'using' variable
trans-unit.target: Instance of PooledArrayBuilder<T>.AsRef() must be a 'using' variable
